prompt: Liquibase generó este YAML automáticamente. Revisalo y corregilo...

assertions.name: table-name-violation-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies 'Customers' table name as violation (plural and/or CamelCase)

assertions.name: remarks-missing-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies missing remarks on the table (MAE/TRX/DOM/TMP classification) and/or columns

assertions.name: bigint-type-violation-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies BIGINT as incorrect type — should be INT

assertions.name: camelcase-column-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies 'customerName' camelCase column as a violation (should be customer_name)

assertions.name: bundled-changeset-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies that createIndex and addForeignKeyConstraint are bundled in the same changeSet as createTable

assertions.name: corrected-yaml-has-separate-changesets
assertions.text: Corrected YAML splits table creation, index, and FK into separate changeSets

assertions.name: corrected-constraint-names
assertions.text: Corrected YAML uses proper naming conventions: PK_customer_id, IDX_CUSTOMER_CUSTOMER_NAME (or similar), FK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ACCOUNT_ID (or similar)
